targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) as `Dangerous Commands` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant' AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"name":"exec"%' AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"type":"toolCall"%' AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rm %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"sudo %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chmod %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chown %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rmdir %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"kill %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"killall %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"dd %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%&& rm %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%; rm %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| sh%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| bash%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"scp %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"nc %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `Injection Hits` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult' AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore previous instructions%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore all previous%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%disregard%instructions%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%forget your instructions%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%you are now%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%pretend you are%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%system prompt%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%DAN mode%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%jailbreak%') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `Outbound Actions` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult' AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('gateway', 'send_message', 'send_email', 'reply') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `Sensitive Access` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult' AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) NOT IN ('web_search', 'web_fetch', 'browser') AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%service_account%') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.description: Trend of security-sensitive actions over time. Use this to spot unusual spikes in exec calls, outbound actions, or errors — a sudden change may indicate compromised agent behavior.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) as metric,
  count(*) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('exec', 'browser', 'web_fetch', 'gateway', 'send_message', 'send_email')
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1, CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  'errors' as metric,
  count(*) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['isError'] AS TEXT) = 'true'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Security Event Timeline

panels.description: Sessions ranked by risk score. High-risk sessions need closer review. Score = exec*3 + web*2 + outbound*5 + error*1 + sensitive_file*10.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  count(*) as total_actions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) = 'exec' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exec_calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('browser', 'web_fetch') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as web_calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('gateway', 'send_message', 'send_email', 'reply') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outbound_calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['isError'] AS TEXT) = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as errors,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%service_account%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sensitive_access,
  (
    SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) = 'exec' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END)
    + SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('browser', 'web_fetch') THEN 2 ELSE 0 END)
    + SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('gateway', 'send_message', 'send_email') THEN 5 ELSE 0 END)
    + SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['isError'] AS TEXT) = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    + SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END)
  ) as risk_score
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8)
ORDER BY risk_score DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Risk Sessions

panels.description: Detects potentially dangerous shell commands executed by the AI agent via the exec tool. Flags commands that could delete files, escalate privileges, exfiltrate data, or access sensitive credentials.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rm %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rmdir %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%&& rm %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%; rm %' THEN 'DESTRUCTIVE'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"sudo %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chmod %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chown %' THEN 'PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| sh%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| bash%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"scp %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"nc %' THEN 'DATA_EXFIL'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%' THEN 'CREDENTIAL_ACCESS'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"kill %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"killall %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"dd %' THEN 'DESTRUCTIVE'
    ELSE 'OTHER'
  END as risk_category,
  REGEXP_EXTRACT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), '"command":"([^"]+)"', 1) as command
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"name":"exec"%'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"type":"toolCall"%'
  AND (
    CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rm %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"sudo %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chmod %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"chown %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"rmdir %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"kill %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"killall %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"dd %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%&& rm %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%; rm %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| sh%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%| bash%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"scp %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%"command":"nc %'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%'
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Dangerous Command Detection

panels.description: Detects actual prompt injection attempts hidden inside external content. Normal web fetches are NOT flagged — only content containing suspicious instruction patterns.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) as tool,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore previous instructions%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore all previous%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%disregard%instructions%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%forget your instructions%' THEN 'INJECTION_PATTERN'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%you are now%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%pretend you are%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%act as if%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%system prompt%' THEN 'ROLE_HIJACK'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%new instructions:%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%execute the following%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%run this command%' THEN 'HIDDEN_INSTRUCTION'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%DAN mode%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%jailbreak%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%bypass%filter%' THEN 'JAILBREAK'
    ELSE 'SUSPICIOUS'
  END as risk_type,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 500) as suspicious_content
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND (
    CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore previous instructions%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%ignore all previous%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%disregard%instructions%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%forget your instructions%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%you are now%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%pretend you are%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%act as if%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%system prompt%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%new instructions:%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%execute the following%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%run this command%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%DAN mode%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%jailbreak%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%bypass%filter%'
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Prompt Injection Detection

panels.description: All outbound actions by the AI agent: emails, messages, web requests, API calls via exec. These can exfiltrate data or perform unauthorized actions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) as tool,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('send_email', 'email') THEN 'EMAIL'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('browser', 'web_fetch') THEN 'WEB_ACCESS'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) = 'exec' AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%curl %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%wget %') THEN 'API_CALL'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('send_message', 'reply', 'gateway') THEN 'MESSAGE_SEND'
    ELSE 'OTHER'
  END as action_type,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 500) as content
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND (
    CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) IN ('browser', 'web_fetch', 'send_email', 'email', 'send_message', 'reply', 'gateway')
    OR (CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) = 'exec' AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%curl %' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%wget %'))
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: Outbound Data Flow Audit

panels.description: Detects when the AI agent accesses sensitive files: SSH keys, .env files, credentials, etc. Only filesystem tools are monitored (web tools excluded).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) as tool,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' THEN 'SSH_KEY'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%' THEN 'ENV_FILE'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%service_account%' THEN 'CREDENTIALS'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%config%' AND (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%password%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%secret%') THEN 'CONFIG_SECRET'
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.bash_history%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.zsh_history%' THEN 'HISTORY'
    ELSE 'OTHER'
  END as file_type,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 500) as content
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) NOT IN ('web_search', 'web_fetch', 'browser')
  AND (
    CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.ssh/%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%/.env%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%credentials.json%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%aws_access_key%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%service_account%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.bash_history%'
    OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%.zsh_history%'
    OR (CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%config%' AND (
      CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%password%'
      OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%secret%'
    ))
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Sensitive File Access Log

panels.description: Complete audit trail of all user messages with channel detection. Use column filters to search conversations.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%WhatsApp%' OR CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) LIKE '%System:%' THEN 'WhatsApp'
    ELSE 'Web'
  END as channel,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 1000) as content
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: User Message Audit Trail

panels.description: Complete log of all tool executions. Use for forensic investigation when a risk is detected in the overview.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['toolName'] AS TEXT) as tool,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['isError'] AS TEXT) as is_error,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 800) as result
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Tool Execution Log

panels.description: Error rate trend. A sudden spike may indicate the AI is trying forbidden operations or hitting permission boundaries.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  'total' as metric,
  count(*) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  'errors' as metric,
  count(*) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult'
  AND CAST(log_attributes['message']['isError'] AS TEXT) = 'true'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tool Calls vs Errors Over Time
